rows.label: qev092606_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nrrrg... It useless. Elder
refuse to take Tora seriously![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0002
rows.name:
Friends should go tell Elder Nan
to give Tora proof of membership
in Nopon Commerce Guild.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mamapon is in panic! Tora will
stay here and calm her down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0004
rows.name:
Friends should hurry
up and save dadapon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0005
rows.name:
Good luck getting
materials to make coin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0006
rows.name:
Though Tora get sinking feeling
really hard part will come after
all ingredients are together...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0007
rows.name:
Friends got all materials?
Amazing! Brilliant! Good enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092606_MSG0008
rows.name:
Now hurry and give them to Elder
Nan so Tora can get inducted
into Nopon Commerce Guild![ST:wait ]
